---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "Software tools and academic explorations."
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
include-after-body:
  text: |
    <script>
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
      const categories = document.querySelectorAll('.listing-category');
      categories.forEach(category => {
        const text = category.innerText.trim();
        if (/^\d{4}$/.test(text)) {
          category.classList.add('year-pill');
        } else {
          const slug = text.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '-');
          category.classList.add('lang-' + slug);
        }
      });
    });
    </script>
listing:
  - id: research-software
    contents:
      - title: "TentMPS.jl"
        description: "Numerical implementation of the Finite-Element Matrix Product State (FE-MPS) framework for simulating 1D continuum models of interacting bosons."
        path: "https://github.com/20akshay00/TentMPS.jl/"
        image: "images/projects/tentmpsjl.png"
        categories: [Julia, "2026"]
      - title: "LiebLinigerBetheAnsatz.jl"
        description: "Numerical implementation of the Bethe Ansatz solution for the 1D Lieb-Liniger model."
        path: "https://github.com/20akshay00/LiebLinigerBetheAnsatz.jl/"
        image: "images/projects/lieblinigerbetheansatzjl.png"
        categories: [Julia, "2026"]
      - title: "HermiteUtils.jl"
        description: "Simple utilities for working with Hermite polynomials and functions."
        path: "https://github.com/20akshay00/HermiteUtils.jl/"
        image: "images/projects/hermiteutils.png"
        categories: [Julia, "2026"]
    type: grid
    fields: [title, description, categories, image]
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: 200px

  - id: software-projects
    contents:
      - title: "ThePhysicsHub"
        description: "Open source repository of interactive physics simulations created by the cumulative effort of a group of undergraduates, built with p5.js."
        path: "https://github.com/OpenPsiMu/ThePhysicsHub"
        image: "images/projects/physicshub.png"
        categories: [JavaScript, "2020"]
      - title: "Schedule Selector"
        description: "A tool to automate course selection and schedule filtering for IISER Mohali students."
        path: "https://20akshay00.github.io/schedule-selector/"
        image: "images/projects/schedule-selector.png"
        categories: [JavaScript, HTML, "2021"]
      - title: "Tetra Engine"
        description: "A simple 2D game engine written in Python with an Ascii-based renderer for treasure hunt events at IISER Mohali."
        path: "https://github.com/DhruvaSambrani/turing-hunt-engine"
        image: "images/projects/tetra.png"
        categories: [Python, "2021"]
      - title: "Pentra Engine"
        description: "An evolution of the Tetra engine utilizing Pygame for 2D rendering with lighting and shadows."
        path: "https://github.com/DhruvaSambrani/pentra"
        image: "images/projects/pentra.png"
        categories: [Python, "2023"]
      - title: "GDWiiInput"
        description: "GDExtension to use Wii controllers with the Godot game engine."
        path: "https://github.com/20akshay00/godot-wii-input/"
        image: "images/projects/godotwiiinput.png"
        categories: [GDScript, C++, "2025"]
    type: grid
    fields: [title, description, categories, image]
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: 200px

  - id: coursework-projects
    contents:
      - title: "Modelling Complex Systems"
        description: "Numerical simulations of SIRS models, Sandpile models, and Kuramoto oscillators."
        path: "https://github.com/20akshay00/modellingComplexSystems"
        image: "images/projects/complex-systems.png"
        categories: [Python, Julia, "2021"]
      - title: "Charge Density Estimation"
        description: "Exploring the piezo-electric effect in PZT and PVDF materials using COMSOL."
        path: "https://github.com/20akshay00/PHY312-Project"
        image: "images/projects/charge-density.png"
        categories: [COMSOL, "2021"]
      - title: "News Recommender System"
        description: "An NLP-based recommender system using web scraping and collaborative filtering."
        path: "https://github.com/20akshay00/News-Recommender-System"
        image: "images/projects/news-recommender.png"
        categories: [Python, "2022"]
      - title: "Signature Fraud Detection"
        description: "Applying K-means clustering to classify and detect fraudulent signatures."
        path: "https://github.com/20akshay00/IDC409/blob/master/project_2_report.pdf"
        image: "images/projects/signature-fraud.png"
        categories: [Python, "2022"]
      - title: "Surface Waves in Fluids"
        description: "A theoretical exploration of the physics of waves on liquid surfaces."
        path: "https://20akshay00.github.io/PHY638-Assignment-5/"
        image: "images/projects/surface-waves.png"
        categories: [HTML, "2023"]
    type: grid
    fields: [title, description, categories, image]
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: 150px

  - id: gamedev-projects
    contents:
      - title: "GTA: Stress City"
        description: "A treasure hunt event built using the tetra game engine."
        path: "https://iiserm.github.io/GTA-Stress-City/"
        image: "images/projects/gta.png"
        categories: [Python, "2021"]
      - title: "Radar Defender"
        description: "A retro arcade-style game made using AlphaZero.jl where players must defend their base from incoming threats."
        path: "https://github.com/20akshay00/RadarDefender"
        image: "images/projects/radar-defender.png"
        categories: [Julia, "2022"]
    type: grid
    fields: [title, description, categories, image]
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: 350px

  - id: misc-projects
    contents:
      - title: "Elastic pendulum"
        description: "Simulation of a pendulum with an elastic string, demonstrating chaotic motion trajectories."
        path: "https://editor.p5js.org/20akshay00/sketches/D3l4cWAm6"
        image: "images/projects/elastic-pendulum.png"
        categories: [JavaScript, "2020"]
      - title: "Coupled pendulum"
        description: "Simulation of two pendulums connected by a spring, exploring energy exchange and normal modes."
        path: "https://editor.p5js.org/20akshay00/sketches/NuIwwXqnR"
        image: "images/projects/coupled-pendulum.png"
        categories: [JavaScript, "2020"]
      - title: "PhysicsJavisAnim"
        description: "A collection of physics-based visualizations created using the Javis.jl library."
        path: "https://20akshay00.github.io/PhysicsJavisAnim/"
        image: "images/projects/physjavisanims.png"
        categories: [Julia, "2021"]
      - title: "Wave-packet dynamics"
        description: "Simulation of the time-evolution of a quantum mechanical wave packet in various 1D potentials."
        path: "https://20akshay00.github.io/Summer2021/"
        image: "images/projects/wavepacketdynamics.png"
        categories: [Python, "2021"]
    type: grid
    fields: [title, description, categories, image]
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: 250px
---

::: {.project-section}
## Research Software
*Specialized libraries and scripts developed during my research involving computational quantum many-body physics.*

:::{#research-software}
:::
:::

::: {.project-section}
## General Software
*Random projects made to solve a problem or explore something new.*

:::{#software-projects}
:::
:::

::: {.project-section}
## Undergraduate Coursework
*Selected academic projects from my time at IISER Mohali.*

:::{#coursework-projects}
:::
:::

::: {.project-section}
## Game Development
*Video games! More projects can be found on my [itch.io profile](https://20akshay00.itch.io/).*

:::{#gamedev-projects}
:::
:::

::: {.project-section}
## Visualization
*Interactive sketches and physics visualizations from my early days of programming.*

:::{#misc-projects}
:::
:::
